splash_desc: கணினி பார்வை & சைகை மொழி-க்கு-பேச்சு மொழிபெயர்ப்பைப் பயன்படுத்தும் அணுகல் தளம்
register_desc: OTP சரிபார்ப்பைப் பயன்படுத்தி உங்கள் நற்சான்றிதழ்களை உருவாக்கவும்.
error_fill_fields: பெயர் மற்றும் மொபைல் இரண்டு புலங்களையும் நிரப்பவும்.
welcome_desc: உங்கள் சாதன இணைப்பு அங்கீகரிக்கப்பட்டது. டாஷ்போர்டை திறக்க தயாராக உள்ளீர்கள்.
hero_desc: சைன்பிரிட்ஜ் ஏஐ அமெரிக்க சைகை மொழி (ASL) சைகைகளை நிகழ்நேர பேச்சு மற்றும் உரையாக மாற்றுகிறது.
manifesto_desc: Communication is a fundamental human right. Our platform is designed around strict WCAG guidelines. With high-contrast geometric themes, large and clear sans-serif typography, and keyboard navigation mechanisms, we guarantee accessibility for all users regardless of visual or motor capabilities.
roadmap_item1: Sign ➔ Voice: Seamless multi-accent speech outputs.
roadmap_item2: Voice ➔ Text: Integrated transcription engines (Whisper STT).
roadmap_item3: Text ➔ Sign: Synthetic 3D avators demonstrating signs in real-time.
roadmap_item4: AI Companion: Contextual translation suggestions and auto-complete filters.
cta_desc: Expand translation maps, record signs, or run live translation sessions to break down language barriers.
footer_copyright: சைன்பிரிட்ஜ் ஏஐ © 2026. பாஹாஸ் அழகியல் கீழ் வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டது. அணுகல் முதலில்.
challenge_desc: Over 70 million deaf individuals globally rely on sign language as their primary mode of communication. However, less than 1% of the hearing population understands sign language, creating absolute barriers in daily routines, workplaces, medical facilities, and emergency scenarios.
solution_desc: SignBridge AI bypasses traditional translators. By processing video feeds and predicting sign features in real time, it reconstructs conversational dialogue, offering instantaneous translation to hearing non-signers via text outputs and voice synthesis.
stage1_desc: The system reads frames from any camera (webcam, external source) using OpenCV, extracting raw visual information at 24+ frames per second.
stage2_desc: Features are processed using MediaPipe to generate x, y, and z skeletal coordinates for pose, fingers, hands, and facial indicators.
stage3_desc: Sequence models monitor joint coordinates over temporal sliding windows to identify gestures and decode them into coherent sentences.
stage4_desc: Decoded sentences are displayed visually and synthesized into synthetic audio formats, facilitating seamless accessibility.
feature_capture_desc: Webcam pipeline running MediaPipe tracking points with minimal lag.
feature_training_desc: Training console to record and export coordinate dataset collections.
feature_seq_desc: LSTM and Transformer architectures decoding sequences into fluent sentences.
feature_hub_desc: Chat transcripts database and accessibility text-to-speech tools.
feature_tts_desc: Coqui TTS engine generating natural voices across multiple languages.
feature_analytics_desc: Usage charts, daily timelines, and classification confidence indicators.
lt_camera_info: Click 'Start Camera' to launch webcam translation stream.
lt_camera_error: Failed to read camera frame. Check webcam connection.
ch_subtitle: Full conversation platform — dialogue management, emotion detection, voice synthesis, and history.
ch_signer_input_desc: In production, this receives output automatically from Layer 4. For testing, enter signs manually.
ch_thread_empty: Conversation thread is empty. Send a signer message to begin.
ch_thread_start_msg: Start a new session using the controls panel.
acc_subtitle: Universal access settings — themes, motion, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support.
acc_visual_desc: Select one or more themes. Multiple themes can be combined (e.g. Dark Mode + Reduced Motion).
acc_sample_card_desc: This card reflects your active theme settings.
acc_screen_reader_help: Adds ARIA live regions and additional screen reader hints.
acc_screen_reader_active: Screen reader mode active. Navigation landmarks enabled.
acc_keyboard_desc: SignBridge AI supports keyboard navigation for hands-free operation. All shortcuts use the ALT modifier key.
acc_sr_test_label: Type a message to test screen reader live region:
acc_footer_desc: SignBridge AI — Accessibility Engine (Layer 10) | WCAG 2.1 Compliant | Universal Design Principles
em_subtitle: Critical communication platform for life-threatening situations.
